title: dendrochilum sarawakense
intro: Dendrochilum sarawakense is a species of orchid native to the tropical forests of Borneo. As a medicinal plant, Dendrochilum sarawakense has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and aiding in the treatment of skin conditions. In traditional medicine, Dendrochilum sarawakense is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and the dried root is used as a powder for topical application.
